title: 📝 كتابة موضوع عن المشاهير (Celebrities)
introduction: اكتب فقرة عن المشاهير. يمكنك اختيار أحد الموضوعين أدناه.

topics.title: الموضوع الأول: A Celebrity (شخص مشهور)
questions: 4. Why do you like to be famous / a celebrity?

topics.title: الموضوع الثاني: Good and Bad Points of Being a Celebrity
questions: 2. What are the good and bad points of being a celebrity?
3. What celebrities do you follow on social media?
4. Which celebrity do you most admire and why?

model: A celebrity is a person who is well known or famous and gets lots of public attention. I have never met a real famous person in my life. But my favorite celebrity is Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud. I don't follow celebrities on social media but sometimes I like to read their thoughts, stories and memories on their Instagram accounts. This makes me feel that I am participating and taking part in their glory, and this gives me a good feeling. They have a huge influence on people, if they can be good role models and famous that would be awesome.
checklist: ✅ هل ذكرت اسماً لشخص مشهور تفضله؟
✅ هل ذكرت رأيك في متابعة المشاهير؟
